title: AWX Job Event Callback Failures to External Logger
dataSources: AWX external logging to Splunk HEC (`awx.analytics.job_events` per AWX docs; `sourcetype=awx:job_events`)
app: AWX / Settings / Logging → Splunk HEC token
spl:
index=automation sourcetype="awx:job_events" logger_name="awx.analytics.job_events"
| search "error" OR "failed" OR "timeout"
| stats count by cluster_host_id, job_id
| where count>=20
| sort -count
description: Lost or errored job event streams break compliance evidence and task-level analytics.
value: Ensures AWX analytics pipeline to Splunk stays healthy for audit and troubleshooting.
implementation: Enable AWX log aggregator; verify `logger_name` and `job_id` fields. Alert on HEC 4xx/5xx patterns in proxy logs.

references.title: AWX logging integration (job events, activity stream)
